tests_run: cd packages/opencode && bun typecheck 2>&1 | grep -c 'error TS2345'
notes: TS2345 errors eliminated from 81 to 0. Reduced total TS errors from 455 to 359. Remaining 359 errors are non-TS2345 types (pre-existing). Some tool source TS2345s were pre-existing Metadata inference issues (not R-parameter related) and remain as non-TS2345 errors.
